vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-setup
vBRIEFInfo.description: Pytest suite with golden fixtures and coverage gate

plan.title: Golden fixture tests — regression-safe STL/3MF output

narratives.Overview: Establish a deterministic test corpus that pins the byte-level output of the pipeline so future refactors can not silently change geometry or 3MF structure.
narratives.Acceptance: tests/ directory contains: (a) unit tests per module under tests/unit/{qr,geometry,writers,cli}_test.py, (b) integration tests under tests/integration/ that run the full pipeline via CliRunner, (c) golden fixtures under tests/fixtures/ — for a fixed set of (text, ec, format, params) tuples, commit both expected.stl and expected.3mf bytes; tests compare produced bytes to fixtures exactly. A `task regen-fixtures` target regenerates the fixtures intentionally. `task test:coverage` enforces ≥85% overall and per-module, failing the build otherwise. CI runs `task check` on ubuntu/macos/windows and fails on any divergence.
narratives.Scope: tests/ tree + Taskfile updates. pytest.ini_options for `addopts = -ra --strict-markers --strict-config` and coverage config. Use `pytest-cov` with `--cov=qr23mf --cov-branch --cov-fail-under=85`.
